mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.real_name as leader_name, u.student_no as leader_student_no, ct.track_name FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON t.competition_track_id = ct.id WHERE t.team_code = #{teamCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.*, u.real_name as leader_name, u.student_no as leader_student_no, ct.track_name FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON t.competition_track_id = ct.id WHERE t.leader_id = #{leaderId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, u.real_name as leader_name, u.student_no as leader_student_no, ct.track_name FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON t.competition_track_id = ct.id WHERE t.competition_track_id = #{competitionTrackId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, u.real_name as leader_name, u.student_no as leader_student_no, ct.track_name FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON t.competition_track_id = ct.id WHERE t.status = #{status} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, u.real_name as leader_name, u.student_no as leader_student_no, ct.track_name FROM team t LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON t.competition_track_id = ct.id WHERE t.status = 'FORMING'
AND ( t.team_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.team_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ct.track_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
